questions.question: According to the second law of thermodynamics

choices.A: energy can neither be created or destroyed.
choices.B: energy can be created or destroyed.
choices.C: any system isolated from an energy source tends to decrease in entropy.
choices.E: any system isolated from an energy source tends toward its least ordered state.

questions.question: The first law of thermodynamics implies that living organisms cannot create their own energy but can only convert one form of energy into another. What, then, is the ultimate source of energy for most living organisms?

choices.B: The chemical energy released by the numerous hydrolytic reactions in a cell
choices.E: ATP made in the mitochondria of both plants and animals

questions.question: One form of colorblindness is caused by gene c carried on the X chromosome in humans. The gene is recessive to its normal allele C. Far more men are colorblind than women. Geneticists explain this by pointing out that
